demographics.living_situation: lives at home with both parents

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: His stomach is huge and rock hard, he is crying in agony, and he keeps throwing up undigested food. (Reported by the parents — the child has Prader-Willi syndrome.)
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: About two hours ago he got into a lot of food at a birthday party when we weren't watching, and now his belly is enormous and hard, he is screaming in pain and has vomited up whole food three times.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 2 hours ago, shortly after he ate a large amount of food very fast at a party
symptom_narrative.character: severe, generalised belly pain with a huge tight bloated stomach; he keeps vomiting up food that looks undigested
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst we have ever seen him — he normally barely reacts to pain, so him crying and groaning like this really frightens us
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: all across the middle and upper belly
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant and getting worse since it started
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: it just keeps getting worse on its own
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: vomiting undigested food three times (not green/bilious), looks pale and sweaty, breathing fast and shallow
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: he has overeaten before but has never looked like this or been in this much pain
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: cannot settle, cannot lie flat comfortably, too distressed to do anything

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: Prader-Willi syndrome — diagnosed as a baby; he has a constant insatiable appetite and never feels full
past_medical_history.how_managed: strict supervision of all food access at home, paediatrician and genetics follow-up

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: severe obesity related to his syndrome
past_medical_history.how_managed: dietitian-guided eating plan and food security at home

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: an undescended testicle that was picked up when he was little

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: 10-year-old, fully dependent on carers for food security; the parents note supervision broke down at the party where he accessed a large amount of food unwitnessed

paediatric_context.developmental_concerns: known Prader-Willi syndrome with hyperphagia and intellectual involvement; high pain tolerance reported by parents

objective_data_offered.value: visibly enormous, tightly bloated upper abdomen; child crying and groaning, pale and sweaty, breathing fast and shallow
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: parent-held phone video in poor light; distension is visible but cannot be measured or palpated remotely

objective_data_offered.value: he has vomited three times and it was whole undigested food, not green or bloody
his belly feels rock hard to us when we touch it and he screams if we press even lightly
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: lay caregiver impression, not a clinical examination
